rag_rules: Place component type contracts in component type scopes with visible feature names and concrete bounds
Use valid AGREE syntax for assumptions and guarantees within annex blocks
generic_rules: Component type contracts should reference visible ports and features only
Guarantees must relate outputs to inputs using visible symbols
Constants and equations in AGREE should match declared types (int, real, bool)
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks use `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, and `const` declarations
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponents in type-level contracts
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
